title: Prevent Server-side Template Injection Attacks
description: Avoid server-side template injections by sanitizing user or third-party data before inserting it into templates.
recommendation: Sanitize user or third-party data before inserting it into templates.
impact: Exposure to attacks that target the underlying rendering server, allowing arbitrary commands execution on the operating system.

checks.message: Sanitize user or third-party data before inserting it into templates to prevent injection attacks
